title: equisetum hyemale var. pseudohyemale
intro: Equisetum hyemale var. pseudohyemale is a variety of the Horsetail plant, a unique and ancient species that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating urinary tract issues and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Equisetum hyemale var. pseudohyemale include its ability to purify the blood, support kidney function, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, or made into capsules for internal use, and is also used externally as a compress or poultice for skin conditions and wounds.
